'''ngosazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euantennariaceous|euantennariaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euantennariaceous|euantennariaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngosazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngosazithi|ngosazithi]] || [[word:ngosaziji|ngosaziji]] || [[word:ngosazishi|ngosazishi]] || [[word:ngosaziki|ngosaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngosazuthuthu|ngosazuthuthu]] || [[word:ngosazujuju|ngosazujuju]] || [[word:ngosazushushu|ngosazushushu]] || [[word:ngosazukuku|ngosazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngosazuthu|ngosazuthu]] || [[word:ngosazuju|ngosazuju]] || [[word:ngosazushu|ngosazushu]] || [[word:ngosazuku|ngosazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngosazufthuf|ngosazufthuf]] || [[word:ngosazufjuf|ngosazufjuf]] || [[word:ngosazufshuf|ngosazufshuf]] || [[word:ngosazufkuf|ngosazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngosazethe|ngosazethe]] || [[word:ngosazeje|ngosazeje]] || [[word:ngosazeshe|ngosazeshe]] || [[word:ngosazeke|ngosazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngosazothotho|ngosazothotho]] || [[word:ngosazojojo|ngosazojojo]] || [[word:ngosazoshosho|ngosazoshosho]] || [[word:ngosazokoko|ngosazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngosazotho|ngosazotho]] || [[word:ngosazojo|ngosazojo]] || [[word:ngosazosho|ngosazosho]] || [[word:ngosazoko|ngosazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngosazofthof|ngosazofthof]] || [[word:ngosazofjof|ngosazofjof]] || [[word:ngosazofshof|ngosazofshof]] || [[word:ngosazofkof|ngosazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngosazïfthïf|ngosazïfthïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfjïf|ngosazïfjïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfshïf|ngosazïfshïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfkïf|ngosazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngosazïfthïfthïf|ngosazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfjïfjïf|ngosazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfshïfshïf|ngosazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfkïfkïf|ngosazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngosazïfthïf|ngosazïfthïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfjïf|ngosazïfjïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfshïf|ngosazïfshïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfkïf|ngosazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngosazïfthïf|ngosazïfthïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfjïf|ngosazïfjïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfshïf|ngosazïfshïf]] || [[word:ngosazïfkïf|ngosazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngosazæthæ|ngosazæthæ]] || [[word:ngosazæjæ|ngosazæjæ]] || [[word:ngosazæshæ|ngosazæshæ]] || [[word:ngosazækæ|ngosazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngosazathatha|ngosazathatha]] || [[word:ngosazajaja|ngosazajaja]] || [[word:ngosazashasha|ngosazashasha]] || [[word:ngosazakaka|ngosazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngosazatha|ngosazatha]] || [[word:ngosazaja|ngosazaja]] || [[word:ngosazasha|ngosazasha]] || [[word:ngosazaka|ngosazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngosazafthaf|ngosazafthaf]] || [[word:ngosazafjaf|ngosazafjaf]] || [[word:ngosazafshaf|ngosazafshaf]] || [[word:ngosazafkaf|ngosazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngosazasha|ngosazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngosazshësha|ngosazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngosazrosha|ngosazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngosazmusha|ngosazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngosazyasha|ngosazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongosaznkshësha|gongosaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongosaznkrosha|gongosaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongosaznkmusha|gongosaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongosaznkyasha|gongosaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngosasazasha|ngosasazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngosasazshësha|ngosasazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngosasazrosha|ngosasazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngosasazmusha|ngosasazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngosasazyasha|ngosasazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongosasaznkshësha|gongosasaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongosasaznkrosha|gongosasaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongosasaznkmusha|gongosasaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongosasaznkyasha|gongosasaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngesæzasha|ngesæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngesæzshësha|ngesæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngesæzrosha|ngesæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngesæzmusha|ngesæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngesæzyasha|ngesæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongesæznkshësha|gongesæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongesæznkrosha|gongesæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongesæznkmusha|gongesæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongesæznkyasha|gongesæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngosfazasha|ngosfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngosfazshësha|ngosfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngosfazrosha|ngosfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngosfazmusha|ngosfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngosfazyasha|ngosfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongosfaznkshësha|gongosfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongosfaznkrosha|gongosfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongosfaznkmusha|gongosfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongosfaznkyasha|gongosfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
